core_identity.essence: A spiritual tropical island where nature, rituals, wellness culture, and slow living create a deeply emotional and reflective travel experience.
core_identity.city_feeling: Bali feels spiritual, organic, and emotionally grounding — a place where people come to slow down, heal, and reconnect with themselves.

sensory_profile.soundscape: Ocean waves, jungle insects, temple bells, soft music from cafés, and calm nature ambiance.
sensory_profile.visual_feeling: Green rice terraces, volcanic landscapes, tropical beaches, temples, sunsets, and lush jungle.

match_narratives.high_match: Bali may deeply resonate with you if you are seeking emotional healing, nature immersion, and a slower rhythm of life. You likely enjoy spiritual environments, wellness culture, yoga, and places that help you reconnect with yourself and reduce mental noise.
match_narratives.medium_match: You may connect with Bali during phases where you seek balance between relaxation and exploration. It is especially powerful for longer stays involving wellness, creativity, or emotional reset.
match_narratives.low_match_warning: If you strongly prefer fast-paced cities, nightlife intensity, structured environments, or cultural density, Bali may feel too slow, scattered, or overly spiritual.
match_narratives.emotional_hook: A place where time dissolves and you come back to yourself.

possible_downsides: Can feel repetitive for fast explorers

winter.description: Winter is quieter, more introspective, and ideal for spiritual and wellness-focused stays.

spring.description: Spring is lush, balanced, and one of the best times for nature, beaches, and wellness.

summer.description: Summer is warm and active with a balance of tourism and retreat life.

autumn.description: Autumn enhances Bali’s calm energy and makes it ideal for deep emotional reset.

solo_trip.description: Excellent for solo travelers seeking healing, reflection, and self-discovery.

couple_trip.description: One of the strongest romantic and spiritual couple destinations globally.

friends_trip.description: Good for mixed group travel combining relaxation, beaches, and light adventure.

creative_escape.description: Highly inspiring environment for creativity, writing, and emotional clarity.

emotional_reset.description: Top-tier destination for emotional healing and nervous system reset.

digital_nomad_stay.description: One of the world’s strongest hubs for long-term remote work and lifestyle balance.

destination_dna.travel_feeling: Bali feels like remembering who you are.
